meta.target_note: Requested target_repo did not exist; used existing wolfssl-master workspace directory.

results.evidence: Hash calculations include entire handshake messages, including DTLS-specific fields: message_seq, fragment_offset, and fragment_length.
results.comment: wolfSSL 初始化发送和期望接收的 DTLS handshake sequence 为 0；发送时写入并递增 message_seq；重传池保存原始 handshake 记录并复用同一个 message_seq；接收端按 dtls_expected_peer_handshake_number 排序、缓存、处理或丢弃。
results.standard_quote: The first message each side transmits in each handshake always has message_seq = 0.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求 DTLS handshake message_seq 从 0 开始、每个新消息递增、重传复用同一值，并且接收端按 next_receive_seq 处理、缓存高序号、丢弃低序号。wolfSSL 的 AddHandShakeHeader 写入并递增 dtls_handshake_number，DtlsMsgPoolSave 在 BuildMessage 前保存发送池以便重传原始字节，DoDtlsHandShakeMsg 解析对端 message_seq 后按 dtls_expected_peer_handshake_number 分支处理，高序号进入 DtlsMsgStore 有序队列，低序号被忽略并可触发重传上一 flight。
results.category: handshake message_seq sequencing implemented

results.related_state_or_step: next_receive_seq initialization for received message sequencing
results.evidence: This counter is initially set to zero.

results.change_condition: when a message is received and its sequence number matches next_receive_seq
results.evidence: When a message is received, if its sequence number matches next_receive_seq, next_receive_seq is incremented and the message is processed.

results.evidence: case hello_verify_request: HelloVerifyRequest;  // New type
results.comment: wolfSSL 在 HandShakeType 枚举中包含 hello_verify_request(3)，并在 DoHandShakeMsgType 中按具体 msg_type 分派解析；未知类型不会因常量存在而被默许。
results.standard_quote: The HelloVerifyRequest message type is hello_verify_request(3).
results.comparison_summary: RFC 将 hello_verify_request(3) 加入 HandshakeType。wolfSSL 的 enum HandShakeType 包含 hello_verify_request = 3，DoHandShakeMsgType 对该类型进入 DoHelloVerifyRequest，其它已知握手类型也按具体处理函数分派。
results.category: DTLS HandshakeType enum implemented

results.change_action: must be one of enumerated HandshakeType values
results.new_value: hello_request(0), client_hello(1), server_hello(2), hello_verify_request(3), certificate(11), server_key_exchange(12), certificate_request(13), server_hello_done(14), certificate_verify(15), client_key_exchange(16), finished(20)
results.evidence:
enum {
     hello_request(0), client_hello(1), server_hello(2),
     hello_verify_request(3),                          // New field
     certificate(11), server_key_exchange (12),
     certificate_request(13), server_hello_done(14),
     certificate_verify(15), client_key_exchange(16),
     finished(20), (255) } HandshakeType;
results.comment: wolfSSL 在 HandShakeType 枚举中包含 hello_verify_request(3)，并在 DoHandShakeMsgType 中按具体 msg_type 分派解析；未知类型不会因常量存在而被默许。
results.standard_quote: The HelloVerifyRequest message type is hello_verify_request(3).
results.comparison_summary: RFC 将 hello_verify_request(3) 加入 HandshakeType。wolfSSL 的 enum HandShakeType 包含 hello_verify_request = 3，DoHandShakeMsgType 对该类型进入 DoHelloVerifyRequest，其它已知握手类型也按具体处理函数分派。
results.category: DTLS HandshakeType enum implemented

results.evidence: When responding to a HelloVerifyRequest, the client MUST use the same parameter values (version, random, session_id, cipher_suites, compression_method) as it did in the original ClientHello.
results.comment: 客户端处理 HelloVerifyRequest 时仅保存 cookie 并重置 DTLS 重传池；后续 ClientHello 仍由原握手状态生成，version/random/session_id/cipher_suites/compression_method 不因 HVR 被重新协商或替换。
results.standard_quote: When responding to a HelloVerifyRequest, the client MUST use the same parameter values.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求客户端响应 HelloVerifyRequest 时复用原 ClientHello 参数并加入 cookie。wolfSSL 的 DoHelloVerifyRequest 校验 HVR 版本、读取 cookie，并重置 DTLS 重传池；客户端 ClientHello 生成路径继续使用 ssl->version、existing random/session/cipher suite 配置，HVR 本身没有覆盖这些参数的代码路径。
results.category: second ClientHello parameter reuse implemented through retransmission state

results.change_action: copy from client's ClientHello record sequence number
results.new_value: record sequence number in the ClientHello
results.evidence: the server MUST use the record sequence number in the ClientHello as the record sequence number in the HelloVerifyRequest.
results.comment: wolfSSL 在发送 HelloVerifyRequest 前把当前发送 record sequence 设置为收到的 ClientHello record sequence，随后 AddRecordHeader 写入该序列号，避免多个 cookie exchange 造成 record sequence 重复。
results.standard_quote: Sequence numbers are maintained separately for each epoch.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求 HelloVerifyRequest 以及后续 initial ServerHello 使用 ClientHello 的 record sequence number 来避免多次 cookie exchange 的重复。wolfSSL 的 SendHelloVerifyRequest 和 DtlsSetSeqNumForReply 都将 dtls_sequence_number_hi/lo 设为 curSeq_hi/lo，AddRecordHeader 再通过 WriteSEQ 写入记录头。
results.category: HelloVerifyRequest record sequence copied from ClientHello

results.change_condition: after the initial ServerHello, once the server has created state
results.evidence: Subsequent ServerHellos will only be sent after the server has created state and MUST increment normally.
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS record header 长度包含 epoch 和 6 字节 sequence；每个 epoch 切换时 sequence 归零；每条发送记录经 DtlsSEQIncrement 取得新 record sequence；MAC additional data 使用 epoch+sequence 的 64 位值；DTLS 1.2 record 版本写为 FE FD。
results.standard_quote: Sequence numbers are maintained separately for each epoch.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求每个 epoch 独立维护 record sequence，从 0 开始；record retransmission 在 DTLS record 层获得新的 sequence；MAC 使用 epoch 与 sequence 拼接的 64 位值；DTLS 1.2 wire version 为 {254,253}。wolfSSL 的 AddRecordHeader/WriteSEQ/DtlsSEQIncrement/BuildMessage 覆盖这些路径，ChangeCipherSpec 后 dtls_epoch++ 并重置 sequence，MAC additional data 也从 WriteSEQ 取得同一 64 位序列。
results.category: record sequence/epoch and DTLS 1.2 wire version implemented

results.evidence: Sequence numbers are maintained separately for each epoch, with each sequence_number initially being 0 for each epoch.
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS record header 长度包含 epoch 和 6 字节 sequence；每个 epoch 切换时 sequence 归零；每条发送记录经 DtlsSEQIncrement 取得新 record sequence；MAC additional data 使用 epoch+sequence 的 64 位值；DTLS 1.2 record 版本写为 FE FD。
results.standard_quote: Sequence numbers are maintained separately for each epoch.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求每个 epoch 独立维护 record sequence，从 0 开始；record retransmission 在 DTLS record 层获得新的 sequence；MAC 使用 epoch 与 sequence 拼接的 64 位值；DTLS 1.2 wire version 为 {254,253}。wolfSSL 的 AddRecordHeader/WriteSEQ/DtlsSEQIncrement/BuildMessage 覆盖这些路径，ChangeCipherSpec 后 dtls_epoch++ 并重置 sequence，MAC additional data 也从 WriteSEQ 取得同一 64 位序列。
results.category: record sequence/epoch and DTLS 1.2 wire version implemented

results.change_condition: for each received record during the life of the session
results.change_action: must not equal any other received record sequence number
results.evidence: the receiver MUST verify that the record contains a sequence number that does not duplicate the sequence number of any other record received during the life of this session
results.comment: wolfSSL 维护 peerSeq window，并在记录已通过解密/MAC 处理后更新窗口；低于窗口左边界或重复 bit 的记录由 DtlsUpdateWindow 返回 SEQUENCE_ERROR。
results.standard_quote: The receive window is updated only if the MAC verification succeeds.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求接收端维护 anti-replay 窗口，拒绝窗口左侧和重复 sequence，只在 MAC 验证成功后更新窗口。wolfSSL 在 DTLS 状态化入口初始化窗口；处理记录时 VerifyMac/VerifyMacEnc 成功之后才调用 DtlsUpdateWindow；wolfSSL_DtlsUpdateWindow 对低序号、窗口内重复 bit 和窗口右侧移动分别处理。
results.category: DTLS anti-replay window implemented after successful deprotection

results.change_condition: from the perspective of the DTLS record layer, when a retransmission is sent
results.evidence: This record will have a new DTLSPlaintext.sequence_number value.
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS record header 长度包含 epoch 和 6 字节 sequence；每个 epoch 切换时 sequence 归零；每条发送记录经 DtlsSEQIncrement 取得新 record sequence；MAC additional data 使用 epoch+sequence 的 64 位值；DTLS 1.2 record 版本写为 FE FD。
results.standard_quote: Sequence numbers are maintained separately for each epoch.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求每个 epoch 独立维护 record sequence，从 0 开始；record retransmission 在 DTLS record 层获得新的 sequence；MAC 使用 epoch 与 sequence 拼接的 64 位值；DTLS 1.2 wire version 为 {254,253}。wolfSSL 的 AddRecordHeader/WriteSEQ/DtlsSEQIncrement/BuildMessage 覆盖这些路径，ChangeCipherSpec 后 dtls_epoch++ 并重置 sequence，MAC additional data 也从 WriteSEQ 取得同一 64 位序列。
results.category: record sequence/epoch and DTLS 1.2 wire version implemented

results.evidence: The receive window is updated only if the MAC verification succeeds.
results.comment: wolfSSL 维护 peerSeq window，并在记录已通过解密/MAC 处理后更新窗口；低于窗口左边界或重复 bit 的记录由 DtlsUpdateWindow 返回 SEQUENCE_ERROR。
results.standard_quote: The receive window is updated only if the MAC verification succeeds.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求接收端维护 anti-replay 窗口，拒绝窗口左侧和重复 sequence，只在 MAC 验证成功后更新窗口。wolfSSL 在 DTLS 状态化入口初始化窗口；处理记录时 VerifyMac/VerifyMacEnc 成功之后才调用 DtlsUpdateWindow；wolfSSL_DtlsUpdateWindow 对低序号、窗口内重复 bit 和窗口右侧移动分别处理。
results.category: DTLS anti-replay window implemented after successful deprotection

results.change_condition: if a record contains sequence numbers lower than the left edge of the receive window
results.evidence: Records that contain sequence numbers lower than the "left" edge of the window are rejected.
results.comment: wolfSSL 维护 peerSeq window，并在记录已通过解密/MAC 处理后更新窗口；低于窗口左边界或重复 bit 的记录由 DtlsUpdateWindow 返回 SEQUENCE_ERROR。
results.standard_quote: The receive window is updated only if the MAC verification succeeds.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求接收端维护 anti-replay 窗口，拒绝窗口左侧和重复 sequence，只在 MAC 验证成功后更新窗口。wolfSSL 在 DTLS 状态化入口初始化窗口；处理记录时 VerifyMac/VerifyMacEnc 成功之后才调用 DtlsUpdateWindow；wolfSSL_DtlsUpdateWindow 对低序号、窗口内重复 bit 和窗口右侧移动分别处理。
results.category: DTLS anti-replay window implemented after successful deprotection

results.change_condition: if the received record falls within the window and is new, or if the packet is to the right of the window
results.related_state_or_step: anti-replay window check before MAC verification
results.evidence: If the received record falls within the window and is new, or if the packet is to the right of the window, then the receiver proceeds to MAC verification.
results.comment: wolfSSL 维护 peerSeq window，并在记录已通过解密/MAC 处理后更新窗口；低于窗口左边界或重复 bit 的记录由 DtlsUpdateWindow 返回 SEQUENCE_ERROR。
results.standard_quote: The receive window is updated only if the MAC verification succeeds.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求接收端维护 anti-replay 窗口，拒绝窗口左侧和重复 sequence，只在 MAC 验证成功后更新窗口。wolfSSL 在 DTLS 状态化入口初始化窗口；处理记录时 VerifyMac/VerifyMacEnc 成功之后才调用 DtlsUpdateWindow；wolfSSL_DtlsUpdateWindow 对低序号、窗口内重复 bit 和窗口右侧移动分别处理。
results.category: DTLS anti-replay window implemented after successful deprotection

results.change_condition: to avoid sequence number duplication in case of multiple cookie exchanges
results.change_action: must equal / copied from another field
results.new_value: record sequence number in the ClientHello
results.evidence: the server MUST use the record sequence number in the ClientHello as the record sequence number in its initial ServerHello.
results.comment: wolfSSL 在发送 HelloVerifyRequest 前把当前发送 record sequence 设置为收到的 ClientHello record sequence，随后 AddRecordHeader 写入该序列号，避免多个 cookie exchange 造成 record sequence 重复。
results.standard_quote: Sequence numbers are maintained separately for each epoch.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求 HelloVerifyRequest 以及后续 initial ServerHello 使用 ClientHello 的 record sequence number 来避免多次 cookie exchange 的重复。wolfSSL 的 SendHelloVerifyRequest 和 DtlsSetSeqNumForReply 都将 dtls_sequence_number_hi/lo 设为 curSeq_hi/lo，AddRecordHeader 再通过 WriteSEQ 写入记录头。
results.category: HelloVerifyRequest record sequence copied from ClientHello

results.new_value: part of the 64-bit value formed by concatenating the epoch and the sequence number in the order they appear on the wire
results.evidence: the sequence number used to compute the MAC is the 64-bit value formed by concatenating the epoch and the sequence number in the order they appear on the wire
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS record header 长度包含 epoch 和 6 字节 sequence；每个 epoch 切换时 sequence 归零；每条发送记录经 DtlsSEQIncrement 取得新 record sequence；MAC additional data 使用 epoch+sequence 的 64 位值；DTLS 1.2 record 版本写为 FE FD。
results.standard_quote: Sequence numbers are maintained separately for each epoch.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求每个 epoch 独立维护 record sequence，从 0 开始；record retransmission 在 DTLS record 层获得新的 sequence；MAC 使用 epoch 与 sequence 拼接的 64 位值；DTLS 1.2 wire version 为 {254,253}。wolfSSL 的 AddRecordHeader/WriteSEQ/DtlsSEQIncrement/BuildMessage 覆盖这些路径，ChangeCipherSpec 后 dtls_epoch++ 并重置 sequence，MAC additional data 也从 WriteSEQ 取得同一 64 位序列。
results.category: record sequence/epoch and DTLS 1.2 wire version implemented

results.evidence: The receiver packet counter for this session MUST be initialized to zero when the session is established.
results.comment: wolfSSL 维护 peerSeq window，并在记录已通过解密/MAC 处理后更新窗口；低于窗口左边界或重复 bit 的记录由 DtlsUpdateWindow 返回 SEQUENCE_ERROR。
results.standard_quote: The receive window is updated only if the MAC verification succeeds.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求接收端维护 anti-replay 窗口，拒绝窗口左侧和重复 sequence，只在 MAC 验证成功后更新窗口。wolfSSL 在 DTLS 状态化入口初始化窗口；处理记录时 VerifyMac/VerifyMacEnc 成功之后才调用 DtlsUpdateWindow；wolfSSL_DtlsUpdateWindow 对低序号、窗口内重复 bit 和窗口右侧移动分别处理。
results.category: DTLS anti-replay window implemented after successful deprotection

results.change_action: must not use for version negotiation judgment
results.evidence: DTLS 1.2 and 1.0 clients MUST use the version solely to indicate packet formatting (which is the same in both DTLS 1.2 and 1.0) and not as part of version negotiation.
results.comment: wolfSSL 发送 HelloVerifyRequest 时使用 DTLS 1.0 wire version，并且客户端只接受 DTLS 1.0/1.2 格式值，不把 HVR 版本用于最终版本协商。输入中的 ServerHello 必须与 HVR 版本相等规则来自 RFC 6347 内部矛盾文本，RFC Errata 4103 指出应删除该相等性要求，因此未作为确认缺陷。
results.standard_section: RFC 6347 Section 4.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures; RFC Errata 4103
results.standard_quote: DTLS 1.2 server implementations SHOULD use DTLS version 1.0.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 6347 同一节先要求 DTLS 1.2 server SHOULD 在 HelloVerifyRequest 使用 DTLS 1.0，又保留了从 DTLS 1.0 复制来的 HVR/ServerHello 版本相等语句。wolfSSL 的 SendHelloVerifyRequest 写 DTLS_MAJOR/DTLS_MINOR，DoHelloVerifyRequest 只检查 HVR 是 DTLS 1.0 或 DTLS 1.2 格式，ServerHello 按最终 ssl->version 发送。该行为符合 DTLS 1.2 HVR 不参与版本协商的意图；ID76/80 在 Phase 2 记录为误报/规范抽取歧义。
results.category: HelloVerifyRequest version handling follows DTLS 1.2 guidance; extracted equality rules are errata-ambiguous

results.change_action: must equal previously received HelloVerifyRequest server version
results.evidence: Upon receipt of the ServerHello, the client MUST verify that the server version values match.
results.comment: 按 RFC 6347 页面 16 的字面抽取，客户端应校验 HVR 与 ServerHello version 相等/服务端应发送相同 version；但同节前文又要求 DTLS 1.2 HVR SHOULD 使用 DTLS 1.0，RFC Errata 4103 指出这是内部矛盾。wolfSSL 未执行相等性校验，而是按 DTLS 1.2 实际互操作行为处理。
results.standard_section: RFC 6347 Section 4.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures; RFC Errata 4103
results.standard_quote: DTLS 1.2 server implementations SHOULD use DTLS version 1.0.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 6347 同一节先要求 DTLS 1.2 server SHOULD 在 HelloVerifyRequest 使用 DTLS 1.0，又保留了从 DTLS 1.0 复制来的 HVR/ServerHello 版本相等语句。wolfSSL 的 SendHelloVerifyRequest 写 DTLS_MAJOR/DTLS_MINOR，DoHelloVerifyRequest 只检查 HVR 是 DTLS 1.0 或 DTLS 1.2 格式，ServerHello 按最终 ssl->version 发送。该行为符合 DTLS 1.2 HVR 不参与版本协商的意图；ID76/80 在 Phase 2 记录为误报/规范抽取歧义。 因 RFC 原文存在互相矛盾的规范句，Phase 1 先按 partial/ambiguous 分类，Phase 2 再结合 RFC Editor errata 和代码测试判为 false_positive。
results.category: RFC6347 HelloVerifyRequest server_version equality text conflicts with DTLS 1.2 guidance

results.evidence: DTLS 1.2 server implementations SHOULD use DTLS version 1.0 regardless of the version of TLS that is expected to be negotiated.
results.comment: wolfSSL 发送 HelloVerifyRequest 时使用 DTLS 1.0 wire version，并且客户端只接受 DTLS 1.0/1.2 格式值，不把 HVR 版本用于最终版本协商。输入中的 ServerHello 必须与 HVR 版本相等规则来自 RFC 6347 内部矛盾文本，RFC Errata 4103 指出应删除该相等性要求，因此未作为确认缺陷。
results.standard_section: RFC 6347 Section 4.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures; RFC Errata 4103
results.standard_quote: DTLS 1.2 server implementations SHOULD use DTLS version 1.0.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 6347 同一节先要求 DTLS 1.2 server SHOULD 在 HelloVerifyRequest 使用 DTLS 1.0，又保留了从 DTLS 1.0 复制来的 HVR/ServerHello 版本相等语句。wolfSSL 的 SendHelloVerifyRequest 写 DTLS_MAJOR/DTLS_MINOR，DoHelloVerifyRequest 只检查 HVR 是 DTLS 1.0 或 DTLS 1.2 格式，ServerHello 按最终 ssl->version 发送。该行为符合 DTLS 1.2 HVR 不参与版本协商的意图；ID76/80 在 Phase 2 记录为误报/规范抽取歧义。
results.category: HelloVerifyRequest version handling follows DTLS 1.2 guidance; extracted equality rules are errata-ambiguous

results.evidence: The server_version field has the same syntax as in TLS.
results.comment: wolfSSL 发送 HelloVerifyRequest 时使用 DTLS 1.0 wire version，并且客户端只接受 DTLS 1.0/1.2 格式值，不把 HVR 版本用于最终版本协商。输入中的 ServerHello 必须与 HVR 版本相等规则来自 RFC 6347 内部矛盾文本，RFC Errata 4103 指出应删除该相等性要求，因此未作为确认缺陷。

results.category: HelloVerifyRequest version handling follows DTLS 1.2 guidance; extracted equality rules are errata-ambiguous

results.change_action: must not assume not-DTLS-1.2 / must not assume eventual negotiation to DTLS 1.0
results.evidence: DTLS 1.2 clients MUST NOT assume that because the server uses version 1.0 in the HelloVerifyRequest that the server is not DTLS 1.2 or that it will eventually negotiate DTLS 1.0 rather than DTLS 1.2.
results.comment: wolfSSL 发送 HelloVerifyRequest 时使用 DTLS 1.0 wire version，并且客户端只接受 DTLS 1.0/1.2 格式值，不把 HVR 版本用于最终版本协商。输入中的 ServerHello 必须与 HVR 版本相等规则来自 RFC 6347 内部矛盾文本，RFC Errata 4103 指出应删除该相等性要求，因此未作为确认缺陷。
results.standard_section: RFC 6347 Section 4.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures; RFC Errata 4103
results.standard_quote: DTLS 1.2 server implementations SHOULD use DTLS version 1.0.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 6347 同一节先要求 DTLS 1.2 server SHOULD 在 HelloVerifyRequest 使用 DTLS 1.0，又保留了从 DTLS 1.0 复制来的 HVR/ServerHello 版本相等语句。wolfSSL 的 SendHelloVerifyRequest 写 DTLS_MAJOR/DTLS_MINOR，DoHelloVerifyRequest 只检查 HVR 是 DTLS 1.0 或 DTLS 1.2 格式，ServerHello 按最终 ssl->version 发送。该行为符合 DTLS 1.2 HVR 不参与版本协商的意图；ID76/80 在 Phase 2 记录为误报/规范抽取歧义。
results.category: HelloVerifyRequest version handling follows DTLS 1.2 guidance; extracted equality rules are errata-ambiguous

results.change_action: must equal value that would be used in ServerHello
results.evidence: The server MUST use the same version number in the HelloVerifyRequest that it would use when sending a ServerHello.
results.comment: 按 RFC 6347 页面 16 的字面抽取，客户端应校验 HVR 与 ServerHello version 相等/服务端应发送相同 version；但同节前文又要求 DTLS 1.2 HVR SHOULD 使用 DTLS 1.0，RFC Errata 4103 指出这是内部矛盾。wolfSSL 未执行相等性校验，而是按 DTLS 1.2 实际互操作行为处理。
results.standard_section: RFC 6347 Section 4.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures; RFC Errata 4103
results.standard_quote: DTLS 1.2 server implementations SHOULD use DTLS version 1.0.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 6347 同一节先要求 DTLS 1.2 server SHOULD 在 HelloVerifyRequest 使用 DTLS 1.0，又保留了从 DTLS 1.0 复制来的 HVR/ServerHello 版本相等语句。wolfSSL 的 SendHelloVerifyRequest 写 DTLS_MAJOR/DTLS_MINOR，DoHelloVerifyRequest 只检查 HVR 是 DTLS 1.0 或 DTLS 1.2 格式，ServerHello 按最终 ssl->version 发送。该行为符合 DTLS 1.2 HVR 不参与版本协商的意图；ID76/80 在 Phase 2 记录为误报/规范抽取歧义。 因 RFC 原文存在互相矛盾的规范句，Phase 1 先按 partial/ambiguous 分类，Phase 2 再结合 RFC Editor errata 和代码测试判为 false_positive。
results.category: RFC6347 HelloVerifyRequest server_version equality text conflicts with DTLS 1.2 guidance

results.evidence: When responding to a HelloVerifyRequest, the client MUST use the same parameter values (version, random, session_id, cipher_suites, compression_method) as it did in the original ClientHello.
results.comment: 客户端处理 HelloVerifyRequest 时仅保存 cookie 并重置 DTLS 重传池；后续 ClientHello 仍由原握手状态生成，version/random/session_id/cipher_suites/compression_method 不因 HVR 被重新协商或替换。
results.standard_quote: When responding to a HelloVerifyRequest, the client MUST use the same parameter values.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求客户端响应 HelloVerifyRequest 时复用原 ClientHello 参数并加入 cookie。wolfSSL 的 DoHelloVerifyRequest 校验 HVR 版本、读取 cookie，并重置 DTLS 重传池；客户端 ClientHello 生成路径继续使用 ssl->version、existing random/session/cipher suite 配置，HVR 本身没有覆盖这些参数的代码路径。
results.category: second ClientHello parameter reuse implemented through retransmission state

results.evidence: The only stream cipher described in TLS 1.2 is RC4, which cannot be randomly accessed. RC4 MUST NOT be used with DTLS.
results.comment: wolfSSL 默认禁用 RC4；即使构建时显式允许 RC4，默认套件构建和显式 cipher list 解析在 DTLS 方法下都用 !dtls 或 version.major == DTLS_MAJOR 过滤 RC4。输入列出的 PSK/KRB5/anon RC4 套件多数在 wolfSSL 中没有实现，无法被 DTLS 使用。
results.standard_quote: RC4 MUST NOT be used with DTLS.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求 RC4 MUST NOT be used with DTLS。wolfSSL settings.h 默认定义 NO_RC4；RC4 被显式允许时，InitSuites 的 RC4 套件加入条件均包含 !dtls，ParseCipherList 和 SetCipherListFromBytes 也在 DTLS method 下检查名称包含 RC4 并跳过。wolfSSL 未实现输入中的 KRB5、DHE_PSK_RC4、PSK_RC4、RSA_PSK_RC4、DH_anon_RC4 套件，已实现的 ECDH/ECDHE RC4 套件也被 DTLS 过滤。
results.category: RC4 cipher suites blocked or unsupported for DTLS

results.evidence: The only stream cipher described in TLS 1.2 is RC4, which cannot be randomly accessed. RC4 MUST NOT be used with DTLS.

results.comment: wolfSSL 默认禁用 RC4；即使构建时显式允许 RC4，默认套件构建和显式 cipher list 解析在 DTLS 方法下都用 !dtls 或 version.major == DTLS_MAJOR 过滤 RC4。输入列出的 PSK/KRB5/anon RC4 套件多数在 wolfSSL 中没有实现，无法被 DTLS 使用。
results.standard_quote: RC4 MUST NOT be used with DTLS.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求 RC4 MUST NOT be used with DTLS。wolfSSL settings.h 默认定义 NO_RC4；RC4 被显式允许时，InitSuites 的 RC4 套件加入条件均包含 !dtls，ParseCipherList 和 SetCipherListFromBytes 也在 DTLS method 下检查名称包含 RC4 并跳过。wolfSSL 未实现输入中的 KRB5、DHE_PSK_RC4、PSK_RC4、RSA_PSK_RC4、DH_anon_RC4 套件，已实现的 ECDH/ECDHE RC4 套件也被 DTLS 过滤。
results.category: RC4 cipher suites blocked or unsupported for DTLS

results.evidence: The only stream cipher described in TLS 1.2 is RC4, which cannot be randomly accessed. RC4 MUST NOT be used with DTLS.

results.evidence: When responding to a HelloVerifyRequest, the client MUST use the same parameter values (version, random, session_id, cipher_suites, compression_method) as it did in the original ClientHello.
results.comment: 客户端处理 HelloVerifyRequest 时仅保存 cookie 并重置 DTLS 重传池；后续 ClientHello 仍由原握手状态生成，version/random/session_id/cipher_suites/compression_method 不因 HVR 被重新协商或替换。
results.standard_quote: When responding to a HelloVerifyRequest, the client MUST use the same parameter values.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求客户端响应 HelloVerifyRequest 时复用原 ClientHello 参数并加入 cookie。wolfSSL 的 DoHelloVerifyRequest 校验 HVR 版本、读取 cookie，并重置 DTLS 重传池；客户端 ClientHello 生成路径继续使用 ssl->version、existing random/session/cipher suite 配置，HVR 本身没有覆盖这些参数的代码路径。
results.category: second ClientHello parameter reuse implemented through retransmission state

results.change_condition: for TLS MAC calculation in DTLS
results.evidence: TLS MAC calculation is parameterized on the protocol version number, which, in the case of DTLS, is the on-the-wire version, i.e., {254, 253} for DTLS 1.2.
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS record header 长度包含 epoch 和 6 字节 sequence；每个 epoch 切换时 sequence 归零；每条发送记录经 DtlsSEQIncrement 取得新 record sequence；MAC additional data 使用 epoch+sequence 的 64 位值；DTLS 1.2 record 版本写为 FE FD。
results.standard_quote: Sequence numbers are maintained separately for each epoch.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求每个 epoch 独立维护 record sequence，从 0 开始；record retransmission 在 DTLS record 层获得新的 sequence；MAC 使用 epoch 与 sequence 拼接的 64 位值；DTLS 1.2 wire version 为 {254,253}。wolfSSL 的 AddRecordHeader/WriteSEQ/DtlsSEQIncrement/BuildMessage 覆盖这些路径，ChangeCipherSpec 后 dtls_epoch++ 并重置 sequence，MAC additional data 也从 WriteSEQ 取得同一 64 位序列。
results.category: record sequence/epoch and DTLS 1.2 wire version implemented

results.change_condition: when employing DTLS version 1.2 in the record
results.evidence: This document describes DTLS version 1.2, which uses the version { 254, 253 }.
results.comment: wolfSSL 的 DTLS record header 长度包含 epoch 和 6 字节 sequence；每个 epoch 切换时 sequence 归零；每条发送记录经 DtlsSEQIncrement 取得新 record sequence；MAC additional data 使用 epoch+sequence 的 64 位值；DTLS 1.2 record 版本写为 FE FD。
results.standard_quote: Sequence numbers are maintained separately for each epoch.
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求每个 epoch 独立维护 record sequence，从 0 开始；record retransmission 在 DTLS record 层获得新的 sequence；MAC 使用 epoch 与 sequence 拼接的 64 位值；DTLS 1.2 wire version 为 {254,253}。wolfSSL 的 AddRecordHeader/WriteSEQ/DtlsSEQIncrement/BuildMessage 覆盖这些路径，ChangeCipherSpec 后 dtls_epoch++ 并重置 sequence，MAC additional data 也从 WriteSEQ 取得同一 64 位序列。
results.category: record sequence/epoch and DTLS 1.2 wire version implemented
